Video.summary: Man gets slobbered on by an affectionate cow; and water skiing bloopers.
Video.title: America's Funniest Home Videos

Video.summary: Sleeping Beauty isn't asleep; kids whack each other in the face; a baby falls face first into a cake.
Video.title: Episode 102

Video.summary: Highlights include a man skiiing into a fire hydrant; sky diving in a lawn chair; an airport wedding proposal.
Video.title: Episode 103

Video.summary: Whale encounter, animal thieves, a boy’s flour fiasco, and a girl’s trumpet fail for her brother.
Video.title: Episode 1601

Video.summary: Groomsmen chased by geese, a raccoon heist, a tot with a toilet seat, and a hammock mishap.
Video.title: Episode 1602
